edgeQuality.details: Poor parallel edge handling - edges overlap significantly, no clear separation between parallel transitions. The toggle->off and toggle->on edges are completely overlapping, making it impossible to distinguish between different transitions.

nodeStyling.details: Excellent node styling with consistent theme integration. Clean, professional appearance with good color contrast and modern design. Node labels are clear and well-positioned.

visibility.details: No clipping issues, all content fully visible. Good spacing and margins. Responsive layout handles the simple toggle machine well.

overallAesthetics.details: Professional appearance but edge quality significantly impacts overall visual quality. Good layout structure but poor edge routing detracts from user experience.

priorityIssues: Parallel edges completely overlap making transitions indistinguishable
Edge routing needs fundamental improvement for parallel transitions
recommendations: Implement curved edge routing for parallel transitions
Learn edge separation algorithms from ForceGraph/Mermaid
Add edge labels or visual distinction for parallel transitions

edgeQuality.reason: Best parallel edge separation with organic routing
Clean structured routing with good separation
Poor parallel edge handling with significant overlap

reactflowImprovements: Learn parallel edge separation from ForceGraph/Mermaid
Add edge distinction for parallel transitions
